vbak.description: SAP SD sales order header table. Contains vbeln (order number), kunnr (customer), erdat (creation date), netwr (net value), waerk (currency), auart (order type).

vbap.description: SAP SD sales order line item table. Contains vbeln (order), posnr (item), matnr (material), menge (quantity), netpr (net price), werks (plant).

bkpf.description: SAP FI accounting document header. Contains belnr (document number), bukrs (company code), gjahr (fiscal year), bldat (document date), budat (posting date), blart (document type), xblnr (reference), monat (period).

bseg.description: SAP FI accounting document line items. Contains belnr, bukrs, gjahr, buzei (line), hkont (GL account), dmbtr (amount in local currency), shkzg (debit/credit indicator S=debit H=credit), kunnr (customer), lifnr (vendor).

ekko.description: SAP MM purchase order header. Contains ebeln (PO number), lifnr (vendor), ekorg (purchasing org), bedat (PO date), waers (currency).

ekpo.description: SAP MM purchase order items. Contains ebeln (PO number), ebelp (item), matnr (material), menge (quantity), netpr (net price), werks (plant), eindt (delivery date).

mseg.description: SAP MM material document segment. Records all goods movements. Contains mblnr (material document), zeile (item), bwart (movement type), matnr (material), menge (quantity), dmbtr (amount), werks (plant), ebeln (PO reference).

aufk.description: SAP PP production order master. Contains aufnr (order number), matnr (material), gamng (order quantity), igmng (confirmed quantity), gstrs (scheduled start), gltrs (scheduled finish), gstri (actual start), getri (actual finish).

kna1.description: SAP SD/FI customer master data. Contains kunnr (customer number), name1 (name), land1 (country), ort01 (city), ktokd (account group).

lfa1.description: SAP MM/FI vendor master data. Contains lifnr (vendor number), name1 (name), land1 (country), ort01 (city), ktokk (account group).

mara.description: SAP MM material master general data. Contains matnr (material number), matkl (material group), meins (base unit of measure), mtart (material type).

mard.description: SAP MM stock levels per plant and storage location. Contains matnr, werks (plant), lgort (storage location), labst (unrestricted stock).
